name: Jean Paul Niyonzima
quote: The OSH in Construction program gave me the confidence and skills to lead safety on site. I now manage PPE compliance and risk assessments daily.

name: Marie Uwera
quote: KSOHTC's practical approach — theory plus real scenarios — prepared me well. I joined our HSE team right after completing the program.

name: Eric Habimana
quote: Structured, regulation-aligned, and delivered by people who care. I recommend KSOHTC to anyone serious about safety in mining or construction.
